feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Profitability and Performance Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Profitability and Performance Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 'Error occurred while reading data from HANA Table in schema SAP_PAPM' while activating a join
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have built a 'Model Table' on top of which I have built a join function type to aggregate the data. Upon activating this join function, we are facing a strange issue - 'Error occurred while reading data from HANA Table in schema SAP_PAPM' . Below is the screenshot.

Please let us know as to how we could fix this issue.

Thank you,

Soundarya C Adiga

entry.title: PaPM function doesn't get deployed at first, and only works after reloading the browser.
entry.content:
Hello Experts! I've been trying to find the solution to this problematic, and I would really appreciate any help that can be provided.

When executing PAPM transactions, they are successfully carried out, but the window does not automatically display. However, the action is indeed performed, and this issue occurs with all transactions. Then after reloading the browser where the query is made, upon executing the function again, the table appears, without any changes to the configuration. The issue is that reloading does not always work on the first attempt, which is bothersome and delays the process.

It is important to note that this issue does not occur in the quality environment, which has the same configuration as the production environment. There, the tables display correctly on the first attempt without the need to reload the browser (whether it's Chrome, Firefox, Edge, etc.). We've reviewed the entire Post-Installation Steps as per SAP request, and everything has been done according to the documentation.

entry.title: Dataload from AWS S3 bucket into PaPm on S/4HANA
entry.content:
Greetings:

We have PaPm as add-on on S/4HANA system. trying to read data from AWS S3 bucket, Facing some issue. Anyone tried this scenario? Do we need to have any additional middleware like temporary storage like HANA database or any SAP BTP service like Integration Suite?

Thanks in advance.

Vittal A.

entry.title: Determine the PA object number using a substitution
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We need to determine the PA object for a large number of G/L accounts and company codes in S/4HANA, and OKB9 is not the most practical option. The OKC9 substitution seems to be a viable alternative, we have found a possible solution through note 39635 - Info: finding the profitability segment using a substitution, but it refers to R/3 and not S/4HANA. Does anyone know of any updated notes or any logic using a user exit for OKC9?

Thank you very much in advance.

Best regards

entry.title: Can we install PaPM on-premise edition as an add-on on S/4 HANA Private Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello PaPM Experts,

I had a query, can we install the papm (on-premise) edition as an add-on on top of S/4 HANA Private Cloud? One of our clients has S/4 HANA private cloud edition and wants to use the PaPM on-premise add-on.

As far as I know, PaPM on-premise can be installed on S/4 HANA, FPSL, FSDP, BW on HANA, BW/4 HANA but all the systems need to be on-premise systems and not hosted privately.

If PaPM (on-premise) edition cannot be installed on top of S/4 HANA private cloud and the client is not inclined for a PaPM Cloud edition, then what is the best proposed architecture for such requirement?

Thanks

Amogh

SAP Profitability and Performance Management

entry.title: How to perform looping in SAP PaPM cloud based on a condition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to traverse through PRHI table to find out the top most WBS Element for a given WBSE value. The logic is, for the given WBS check whether the 'UP' field WBSE value is blank in PRHI table, if not pick the UP field WBSE value and repeat the same.

The process ends when we find an entry with UP field blank and that will be our topmost node. We are not able to find a way to perform this iteration in PaPM. We had tried iterative view, but that couldn't suffice the requirement.

Could you please suggest a way on how we can perform this?

Regards,

Hanna

entry.title: Integration of SAP PAPM with SAP S/4HANA for Automated Master Data Retrieval?
entry.content: Ιs it possible to integrate SAP PAPM with SAP S/4HANA and automatically receive Ιs it possible to in

entry.title: Fill data in multiple reports by executing 1 function in process
entry.content:
Dear experts 

Currently, I have a process in PAPM consisting of four reports, each linked to a specific view function. Currently, I need to execute four separate functions (1 for each view function) within my process activities before I have results in all 4 reports. I'm interested in consolidating these four functions into a single activity execution. So I want to execute one step in the process, but I would still need to see data in the 4 different reports. Is there a function or workaround available to achieve this?

Best,

Nathan

entry.title: PaPM on-premise - Is there a Table which cointains the FID dependences?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I'm struggling with searching a table that shows "where used" dependences between functions. When you enter in a specific Environmend ID and version from modeling view, when you click on a function and then on "where used" button, it opens a pop up that show the list of the functions that used that function. Anyone knows in SE11 if there is a specific table that show this?

Thank you!

entry.title: COPA Derivation for Partner functions cannot working
entry.content:
S/4 Hana 2023.I have created a derivation rule for Partner functions  Sales Representative(Z2). This field is populating in test mode in KEDR based on sales order number, But when I post delivery and Billing documents, This field is not populating in COPA document

 

I have followed below steps.

1. I have created a characteristic for Sales Representative(ZZ1_ZEIGYOTT_MSE).

2. Created 2 derivation steps for the characteristic as below.

Sales Representative r

SOURCE FIELDS

VBPA-VBELN = COPA-KAUFN

VBPA-POSNR = COPA-KDPOS (selected Initial value allowed and Entire field content check box)

VBPA-PARVW = GLOBAL-USERTEMP1 (Specified Constant = SD Part Function(i.e.Z2)

TARGET FIELDS

VBPA-KUNNR = COPA-ZZ1_ZEIGYOTT_MSE

The other derivation is same as above except VBPA-POSNR = COPA-KDPOS (constant 000000)

this is working in test mode of KEDR based on sales Order, but during posting these are not flowing.

entry.title: Syntax to include process selection in where clause of complex selection
entry.content:
Hello Team,
As we are trying to write a syntax to include process selection in where clause of complex selection in JOIN and user needs to select multiple values not one & run the Calculation.
Could you please help me on the right syntax in PAPM cloud environment.
Thanks in advance.
Mandy

entry.title: Which SAP Activate Roadmap is for PaPM Cloud implementation project?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I'm currently setting up a project plan for a PaPM cloud implementation project. I want to apply SAP Activate Methodology. However, I'm not sure which (cloud) Roadmap could apply to this kind of projects? Could any of you please kindly share you suggestions? I have attached the screenshots for possible roadmaps currently available for "Cloud Specific Methodology" and "General / Cross Topics". Thank you in advance!

Kind regards,

Yi

entry.title: PaPm cloud Count number employees or other field
entry.content:
Dear experts

I try in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud a model Join or a query do a count of a field for example count number employees

year-month area   employee    prodcut
202309      01       Michael      A1
202309      01       Paula        A2
202309      02       Michael      A2
202309      01       Michael      A2
202309      01       Pedro        A2
202309      02       Michael    A1


The result I need is for example

Area count_employees
01    3
02    1


Year-month count_emp
202309       3


Currently when I use count(distict EMPLOYEE) formula in a model join, the result is count the number field return the all join

 

Area count
01    4
02    2


year-month   count
202309         6


Currently I use count(distinct <name field>) but the behavior is that count number flied return of the model join.


Best,

Juan

entry.title: PAPM on premise Duplicated Activities in Process Management
entry.content:
Hi

I have got a issue when I try to instance some activity in Process Management this is duplicated in activities and selections too.

Note. NXI SP is SAPK-30010INNXI in SAP Profitability and Performance Management 

 

I apreciate any helps.

 

Regads,

 

Juan

entry.title: Error when Importing Accounting Rules Engine Sample Content for PaPM Universal Model
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I'm following this Download, Import, and Activate the Sample Content to import the Accounting Rules Engine sample in the PaPM Universal Model. There is an error message: Connected environment used by connection SARE2402 is missing after I execute step 2.d: Select the uploaded file and choose Import Environment. Can you help to figure out the cause of this error?

Regards,
Grace

entry.title: Query About Process Chains in SAP PAPM
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a question regarding process chains in SAP Profitability and Performance Management (PAPM). During implementation, we typically create one process chain. Upon completion of the implementation, we deployed the above process chain that time another process chain is automatically created . Both process chains are visible during function runs after implementation.

My question is: which process chain is the correct one to choose during function execution, and why? after implementation

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud: Remote Source Properties
entry.content:
Hi All,

in the PaPM Cloud's hana database explorer, for a remote source, is there a way to increase the list of hana tables displayed as remote objects for a schema? Is there any remote source setting that needs to be changed? Only a limited number of hana tables are displayed.

Thanks.

Riccardo

entry.title: PaPM On Premise - Dual Control with Simulation Process Template
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is it possible to manage the order of activities if the process template is set as "Simulation"? (Example: If task A001 was not completed, prevent task A002 from running.) Because I noticed that this is possible if the process template is set as "Run" by setting the "previous activity" column but this type of template does not allow the possibility of modifying the parameters.

Thank you,
Riccardo

entry.title: RFA PAPM accounts payable item function issue
entry.content:
Dear all,

 

we are trying post back from PaPM to S/4 using RFA Accounts payable line item function. however getting error-

 

No currency line item exists for line item 000000002 (parameters account GL), we tried all options but no luck.

 

we have only one currency field which was mapped already. Has anyone used this function before: do we need any additional config for this ? please suggest as we are able to post all other RFA GL/ accounts payable works

 

Thanks

entry.title: Test
entry.content: Test
